About DOROZ

Building Trust with Premium uPVC Doors & Windows.

Who We Are

DOROZ is a trusted name in premium uPVC Doors & Windows. We provide high-quality products, expert installation and reliable customer support for residential and commercial projects.

Our goal is to deliver durable, stylish and energy-efficient solutions that enhance every home and workplace.

0

Projects Completed

0

Happy Customers

Our Mission

To provide premium quality uPVC products with honest pricing, expert craftsmanship and outstanding customer satisfaction.

Our Vision

To become one of India's most trusted brands for modern uPVC Doors & Windows.

20 Years Warranty

Your trust is our biggest achievement.

Long-Term Warranty

Selected DOROZ uPVC products come with up to 20 years warranty.

Professional Installation

Our experienced installation team ensures perfect fitting and finishing.

Customer Support

Support is available throughout the warranty period for eligible services.

Why Customers Trust DOROZ

  • ✔ Premium Quality Materials
  • ✔ Skilled Installation Team
  • ✔ Transparent Pricing
  • ✔ Modern Designs
  • ✔ Fast Project Completion
  • ✔ Genuine Customer Support
  • ✔ Trusted by Hundreds of Customers
  • ✔ Free Site Visit & Quotation

Let's Build Something Beautiful Together

Contact DOROZ today for premium uPVC Doors & Windows.
